Acid Rain.Effect: The weather becomes Acid Rain for 3 rounds. While in Acid Rain, all non-Poison or Steel Type Pokémon lose a Tick of Hit Points at the beginning of their turn. In addition, Venoshock counts targets in Acid Rain as being Poisoned.

Asteroid Belt.Effect: The user gains 5 Asteroid Counters. Whenever the user is hit by a Melee Attack the user may expend one Asteroid Counter. If they do, the triggering foe loses a Tick of Hit Points, and on a d20 roll of 20 is Frozen.

Asteroid Shot.Effect: Asteroid Shot Burns the target on a 19+.

Atom Split.Effect: The user’s Hit Points are set to -50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way. The user’s loyalty toward its trainer may be lowered. Damp prevents this Move from being used.

Battering Ram.Effect: Blessings may not be activated in response to Battering Ram.

Brace.Effect: The user’s Attack and Special Attack each gain -1 CS. The user’s Defense and Special Defense each gain +1 CS. The user is immune to Critical Hits until the end of its next turn.

Catalogue.Effect: Randomly select another Pokémon on the user’s roster and then randomly select an Ability that Pokémon has. Catalogue’s user gains that Ability immediately until the end of the Scene, or until it uses this Move again. This may not select Abilities that may not be traced or swapped.

Caustic Breath.Effect: The Target’s Defense and Special Defense are lowered by 1 CS on a 17+.

Cheap Shot.Effect: If Cheap Shot hits, it is a Critical Hit.

Corrupt.Effect: The target gains -2 CS in two stats, determined randomly. Roll 2d6, re-rolling results of 6, and duplicate results. 1 is Attack, 2 is Defense, 3 is Special Attack, 4 is Special Defense, 5 is Speed. On a miss, the target only loses -1 CS in each stat.

Cosmic Ascent.Effect: After resolving damage from this Move, Quetzar transforms into Space Forme.
Cosmic Ascent.Special: This move may not be used in the same Scene as Genesis Shackles.

Dust Devil.Effect: When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Dust Devil, Flying-Typed targets calculate damage as if Flying was neutral to Ground. Dust Devil ignores the Levitate ability.

Engulf.Effect: Engulf destroys all Hazards within the Cone and removes Leech Seeds and the Trapped or Stuck status of the user and those in the Cone (even immune Targets).

Fiesta.Effect: Set 4 square meters of Treat hazards within 6 meters (these are only Hazards for the purposes of effects that remove Hazards – foes cannot otherwise interact with them). Any ally that ends their turn in a Treat hazard removes that Hazard and gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points.

Frost Slash.Effect: If used as a Pass Move, Frost Slash is a Critical Hit on 18+. If used as a Melee, 1 Target Move, Frost Slash Freezes the Target on a 19+

Genesis Shackles.Effect: All targets hit by Genesis Shackles are Slowed and Trapped until they Take a Breather. After resolving damage from this Move, Quetzar transforms into Statue Forme.
Genesis Shackles.Special: This move may not be used in the same Scene as Cosmic Ascent.

Karma Beam.Effect: If the user was damaged by a Super Effective Move since the end of its last turn, Karma Beam has a Damage Base of 14 (4d10+15 / 40) instead.

Leaf Shield.Effect: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage. If it is Sunny, double the amount of Combat Stages gained

Meltdown.Effect: The user’s Hit Points are set to -50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way. The user’s loyalty toward its trainer may be lowered. Damp prevents this Move from being used.

Mudslide.Effect: All Legal Targets have their Evasion lowered by 1.

Null Room.Effect: The area becomes Null for 5 rounds. While Null, all Pokémon have one of their Abilities Disabled (determined at random, roll when either the area becomes Null, or when the Pokémon first enters or re-enters the Null area.)

Overdrive.Effect: The user’s Special Attack and Speed each increase by 1 CS.

Perplex.Effect: If the target is Confused, Perplex’s Damage Base is increased to Damage Base 13 (4d10+10 / 35).

Possession.Effect: The target reveals its Attack stat. When calculating damage, add the target’s Attack stat instead of the user’s Special Attack stat. Possession is still otherwise Special (Special Evasion is used to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.).

Prism Beam.Effect: This Move is the same type as the Primary Type of its user. It is unaffected by the Ability Normalize.

Salt Crash.Effect: The user’s Defense raises by 1 CS.

Shield Bash.Effect: When calculating damage, the user adds their Defense to Shield Bash’s damage instead of their Attack.

Singularity.Effect: The area becomes Neutral for 5 rounds. While Neutral, all attacks are treated as dealing Neutral Effective damage to all targets. This effectiveness may still be changed after the fact by Moves and Abilities.

Spirit Fire.Effect: This move Burns foes on a roll of 18+. All allies in this move’s area of effect gain +1 CS in their stat of choice.

Standoff.Effect: The user and one foe in the Burst enter a Standoff with each other. While in a Standoff, creatures are Trapped, take a -3 penalty to accuracy against creatures outside the Standoff, and resist all damage from creatures outside the Standoff one step further. In addition, those in a Standoff may not voluntarily move more than 5m away from the other participant. If forced to move, they may not move in any way unless it brings them closer to the other participant. A Standoff ends when either participant Faints or is recalled (such as by U-Turn or Roar).

Storm of Gold.Effect: This move Confuses targets on a roll of 19+. Storm of Gold scatters metal coins equal in value to 2d10 times the user’s level. If it is a trainer battle, the winner of the battle gets to pick up the coins.

Tempest.Effect: The Weather becomes Clear. Clear Weather is the default weather, conferring no innate bonuses or penalties of any sort.

Web Ball.Effect: The Target’s Speed is lowered 1 CS.

Wind Shear.Effect: If the target has not yet acted in this round, Wind Shear’s Damage Base is increased to Damage Base 10 (3d8+10 / 24).
